issues.description: Card has non-empty effect text but effects array is empty. Must define trigger, conditions, and actions.
[Your Turn] in text requires duration:"DuringYourTurn", not empty or Permanent

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [On Play] If your Leader is multicolored and your opponent has 7 or less DON!! cards on their field, your opponent rests 1 of their active DON!! cards at the start of their next Main Phase.
